name: Adventure
description: Narrative-driven experience focused on story, exploration, and puzzle-solving with minimal combat

mechanics.coreLoop: Explore narrative-rich environments → Interact with characters → Solve puzzles and uncover clues → Make meaningful story choices → Progress narrative → Experience consequences
playerActions: Explore detailed environments and examine objects
Engage in dialogue with branching conversation trees
Collect and combine items to solve puzzles
Uncover hidden lore through documents and environmental storytelling
Discover multiple story paths and endings

mechanics: Inventory expands with key items and tools
Relationship meters with NPCs affect dialogue options
Knowledge-based progression (learn information to unlock new areas)
Branching paths based on player choices

winConditions: Reach one of multiple story endings
Complete character arcs based on choices made
failConditions: Generally no fail states - player can always progress
Some choices may lead to 'bad' endings

resourceSystems.name: Inventory
resourceSystems.mechanics: Collect items used to solve puzzles or unlock dialogue options

resourceSystems.name: Knowledge/Clues
resourceSystems.mechanics: Information gathered through exploration, unlocks new dialogue and puzzle solutions

resourceSystems.name: Relationship Points
resourceSystems.mechanics: Choices affect NPC relationships, influencing story outcomes

setting.era: Can range from historical to contemporary to fantastical
setting.location: Richly detailed, atmospheric locations with strong sense of place
setting.worldType: Grounded with emphasis on believable characters and emotional resonance

protagonist.background: Ordinary person thrust into extraordinary circumstances, or investigator seeking truth
protagonist.motivation: Solve a mystery, find a missing person, uncover a conspiracy, or make a life-changing decision

conflict.primary: A central mystery, moral dilemma, or personal journey that drives the narrative forward
secondary: Internal struggle with past trauma or difficult choices

worldRules.physics: Realistic and grounded in the chosen setting
worldRules.magic: If present, magic is subtle and integral to the world's mystery rather than a gameplay mechanic
worldRules.technology: Appropriate to the time period and setting, used for storytelling rather than combat

difficulty: Low mechanical difficulty, high intellectual engagement
targetAudience: Players who prioritize story and character development over action
